name: Cucumber and Mint Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumber and cut it in half lengthwise.
2. Scoop out and discard the seeds.
3. Finely chop the flesh of the cucumber and place it in a colander.
4. Sprinkle with salt and let sit over a plate for 30 minutes to allow excess liquid to drain away.
5. Rinse the chopped cucumber under cold water and squeeze out any remaining moisture.
6. Transfer the cucumber to a mixing bowl.
7. Add the dark walnut oil, fresh lemon juice, and finely chopped mint.
8. Mix well until combined.
9. Serve in a small serving bowl.
10. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
